title: campylospermum lanceolatum var. reflexum
intro: Campylospermum lanceolatum var. reflexum is a plant species within the family Ochnaceae, commonly known as the 'stinking stick' due to its strong unpleasant smell. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antifungal, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Campylospermum lanceolatum var. reflexum include treating wounds, skin infections, and fever, as well as being used as an insect repellent. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
